label: Gtaa
signal: Hold each sleeve only when above its 200-day SMA, else move to cash.
description: Faber (2007) GTAA: 5 asset-class ETFs (SPY, EFA, IEF, DBC, VNQ) at 20% each, each held only when above its 200-day SMA (else to SHV cash). Winner variant: monthly rebalance (vs weekly). Reference: Faber 2007 + Concretum QuanTips #1 (papers in folder).
reference: Faber (2007), 'A Quantitative Approach to Tactical Asset Allocation' (+ Concretum QuanTips #1; papers in folder)
